docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY YANG, YANMENGSHU AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, XIANHUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE /ZOOM (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, YANMENGSHU
EXHIBIT (PLAINTIFF: YANG, YANMENGSHU) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: OCT-07-2021 AT 3:30PM}
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF YANMENGSHU YANG IS PRESENT. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPERTER EDWARD CHU, #300949 ACT AS INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT XIANHUI LIANG IS PRESENT. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTEPERTER KATHY CHANG #301143 ACTS AS INTPERPERTER FOR DEFENDANT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $802.60. PLAINTIFF PAYS DEFENDANT ELECTRONICALLY THROUGH ZELLE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF CONFIRMS RECEIPT OF PAYMENT. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, YANMENGSHU
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-08-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, XIANHUI
ORDER DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
